name: Caterpie
description: A Bug-type caterpillar found in the early routes. Its antenna releases a terrible stench to repel predators.

name: Metapod
description: The cocoon form of Caterpie. It hardens its shell while waiting to evolve into Butterfree.

name: Butterfree
description: The final form of Caterpie. Its colorful wings scatter poisonous scales when it flaps them.

name: Rattata (Alolan)
description: An Alolan form of Rattata. It turned Dark-type after becoming nocturnal to avoid the imported Yungoos.

name: Raticate (Alolan)
description: An Alolan form of Raticate. It commands groups of Rattata and hoards food in its nest.

name: Spearow
description: A Normal/Flying bird Pokemon with a fierce temper. It flaps its small wings frantically to stay aloft.

name: Fearow
description: The evolved form of Spearow. It circles the skies on its large wings, swooping to attack with its long beak.

name: Ekans
description: A Poison-type snake Pokemon. It silently slithers through grass, striking prey with poison fangs.

name: Arbok
description: The evolved form of Ekans. The pattern on its chest can paralyze foes with fear.

name: Pikachu
description: The iconic Electric-type mouse Pokemon. It stores electricity in its cheek pouches.

name: Raichu (Alolan)
description: An Alolan form of Raichu. It surfs on its tail using psychic energy. Researchers believe Alolan pancakes caused the change.

name: Sandshrew (Alola Form)
description: An Alolan regional variant of Sandshrew. It lives on snowy mountains and has a shell of ice-hardened steel that is both hard and elastic.

name: Sandslash (Alola Form)

locations.notes: Use Ice Stone on Alolan Sandshrew

description: The evolved form of Alolan Sandshrew. Its steel spines are covered in ice. It curls up and rolls at high speed, mowing down enemies with its icy quills.

name: Clefairy
description: Its adorable behavior and cry make it popular among people. It is, however, rare and found only in certain areas.

name: Clefable
description: A timid fairy Pokemon that is rarely seen. It will run and hide the moment it senses people.

name: Vulpix (Alola Form)
description: An Alolan regional variant of Vulpix. It originally came to Alola with humans and moved to snowy mountain peaks to avoid other Pokemon.

name: Ninetales (Alola Form)

locations.notes: Use Ice Stone on Alolan Vulpix

description: The evolved form of Alolan Vulpix. It creates ice crystals by exhaling air at -58 degrees F and is revered as a deity incarnation in the Alolan region.

name: Jigglypuff
description: When its huge eyes waver, it sings a mysteriously soothing melody that lulls its enemies to sleep.

name: Wigglytuff
description: Its fur is extremely fine, dense, and elastic. When angered, it will suck in air and inflate its body to an enormous size.

name: Zubat
description: A Poison/Flying bat Pokemon found in caves and dark areas. It uses ultrasound to navigate.

name: Golbat
description: The evolved form of Zubat. Its fangs are hollow and can drain 300cc of blood per bite.

name: Paras
description: Mushrooms named tochukaso grow on its back. They grow along with the host Paras.

name: Parasect
description: A mushroom grown larger than the host's body controls Parasect. It scatters poisonous spores.

name: Diglett (Alolan)
description: An Alolan form of Diglett with metallic hair-like growths. They sense vibrations in the ground.

name: Dugtrio (Alolan)
description: An Alolan form of Dugtrio. Its metallic whiskers are revered as an embodiment of the earth goddess Pele.

name: Meowth (Alolan)
description: An Alolan form of Meowth. Raised by royalty, it became prideful and gained the Dark type.

name: Persian (Alolan)
description: An Alolan form of Persian. Its round face is a sign of wealth and status in Alolan culture.

name: Psyduck
description: A Water-type duck Pokemon perpetually plagued by headaches. When the pain becomes unbearable, it unleashes psychic power.

name: Golduck
description: The evolved form of Psyduck. It is an excellent swimmer and is sometimes mistaken for a kappa.

name: Mankey
description: A Fighting-type monkey Pokemon that is always angry. Even the smallest thing can send it into a rage.

name: Primeape
description: The evolved form of Mankey. Its rage reaches a peak in battle, making it incredibly dangerous.

name: Growlithe
description: A loyal Fire-type puppy Pokemon. It bravely stands up to bigger foes to protect its Trainer.

name: Arcanine
description: The evolved form of Growlithe. A legendary Pokemon in Chinese lore, known for its majestic speed and grace.

name: Poliwag
description: For Poliwag, swimming is easier than walking. The swirl pattern on its belly is actually part of its internal organs showing through the skin.

name: Poliwhirl
description: The surface of its body is always wet and slippery, making it difficult to grab hold of.

name: Poliwrath
description: An adept swimmer, it knows the front crawl, butterfly, and more. It is faster than the best human swimmers.

name: Abra
description: A Psychic-type Pokemon that sleeps 18 hours a day. It teleports away when it senses danger.

name: Kadabra
description: The evolved form of Abra. It emits alpha waves so powerful that nearby electronics malfunction.

name: Alakazam
description: The final evolution of Abra. With an IQ over 5000, it is one of the smartest Pokemon in existence.

name: Machop
description: A Fighting-type Pokemon that trains nonstop. It can hurl 100 adults before getting tired.

name: Machoke
description: The evolved form of Machop. It wears a belt to hold back its immense power.

name: Machamp
description: The final form of Machop. Its four arms allow it to punch at blinding speed from every angle.

name: Tentacool
description: A Water/Poison jellyfish Pokemon found throughout Alola's waters. Its tentacles deliver a nasty sting.

name: Tentacruel
description: The evolved form of Tentacool. Its 80 tentacles can stretch to ensnare prey from a great distance.

name: Geodude (Alola)
description: Its body is a magnetic rock. Iron sand attaches firmly to the portions of its body that are particularly magnetic.

name: Graveler (Alola)
description: Its magnetic body draws iron objects to it. The ore it swallows causes its body to become magnetized.

name: Golem (Alola)
description: It fires rocks charged with electricity. Even if the rock misses, the electric shock wave upon landing will get the job done.

name: Slowpoke
description: An incredibly slow and dim Pokemon. It takes five seconds to feel pain after being struck.

name: Slowbro
description: The evolved form of Slowpoke. A Shellder clamped onto its tail, giving it intelligence and Psychic power.

name: Magnemite

evolution.condition: Level up at Vast Poni Canyon

description: An Electric/Steel Pokemon that hovers using electromagnetic waves and feeds on electricity.

name: Magneton

evolution.condition: Level up at Vast Poni Canyon

description: Three Magnemite linked by magnetism. It generates powerful radio interference.

name: Seel
description: A Water-type sea lion Pokemon. It loves cold temperatures and is most active in frigid water.

name: Dewgong
description: The evolved form of Seel. It adores sleeping on bitterly cold ice and is graceful in the water.

name: Grimer (Alolan)
description: An Alolan form of Grimer. Created to deal with Alola's garbage problem; its colors come from chemical reactions.

name: Muk (Alolan)
description: An Alolan form of Muk. Each colored crystal is a toxin; touching them with bare hands causes illness.

name: Shellder
description: A Water-type bivalve Pokemon. Its shell is harder than diamond and protects it from most attacks.

name: Cloyster
description: The evolved form of Shellder. It slams its shell shut to fire spikes at approaching threats.

name: Gastly
description: A Ghost/Poison gas Pokemon. Its body is made of 95% gas, and it envelops prey in its gaseous form.

name: Haunter
description: The evolved form of Gastly. It licks victims with its gaseous tongue to steal their life force.

name: Gengar
description: The final form of Gastly. It hides in shadows and drops the temperature by nearly 10 degrees.

name: Drowzee
description: A Psychic-type tapir Pokemon. It puts enemies to sleep and eats their dreams for sustenance.

name: Hypno
description: The evolved form of Drowzee. It swings its pendulum to hypnotize and feed on the dreams of its prey.

name: Exeggcute
description: A Grass/Psychic egg Pokemon. Though they resemble eggs, they are actually more closely related to plant seeds. They communicate via telepathy.

name: Exeggutor (Alola Form)
description: The Alolan form of Exeggutor. Growing to over 35 feet tall in the tropical sun, it is revered as Alola's symbol. Its long neck is its weak point.

name: Cubone
description: When it thinks of its dead mother, it cries. Its crying makes the skull it wears rattle hollowly.

name: Marowak (Alola)

locations.notes: SOS called by Cubone at night

description: The bones it holds are its weapons. This Alolan variant dances wildly with burning bones in the dead of night.

name: Lickitung
description: A Normal-type licking Pokemon. Its tongue is over six feet long and is more dexterous than its hands. Anything it licks becomes numb.

name: Chansey
description: A kind-hearted Pokemon that shares its nutritious egg with injured people and Pokemon.

name: Kangaskhan
description: If you come across a young Kangaskhan playing by itself, you must never disturb it or attempt to catch it. The baby's parent is sure to be furious.

name: Goldeen
description: Its dorsal and pectoral fins are strongly developed like muscles. It can swim at a speed of five knots.

name: Seaking
description: In autumn, its body becomes fattened in preparation for the spawning season. It swims powerfully up rivers.

name: Staryu
description: Even if its body is torn, it can regenerate as long as the glowing central core remains intact.

name: Starmie
description: Its central core glows with the seven colors of the rainbow. Some people value the core as a gem.

name: Mr. Mime
description: The evolved form of Mime Jr. It creates invisible walls by miming them into existence.

name: Scyther
description: A Bug/Flying mantis Pokemon. Its razor-sharp scythes can slice through logs in one stroke and become sharper by cutting through hard objects.

name: Jynx
description: The evolved form of Smoochum. It moves rhythmically, swaying and dancing to compel others to join in.

name: Electabuzz
description: Electricity runs across the surface of its body. In darkness, its entire body glows a whitish blue.

name: Magmar
description: In battle, it blows out intensely hot flames from all over its body to intimidate its opponent. These fiery bursts create heat waves.

name: Pinsir
description: It grips prey with its pincers until the prey is torn in half. What it can't tear, it tosses far.

name: Tauros
description: When it targets an enemy, it charges furiously while whipping its body with its long tails.

name: Magikarp
description: A pathetically weak Water-type fish. Despite being nearly useless, it evolves into the fearsome Gyarados.

name: Gyarados
description: The evolved form of Magikarp. A fearsome sea serpent with a violent temper that can level cities.

name: Lapras
description: A Water/Ice transport Pokemon. It ferries people across the sea on its back. Lapras was hunted almost to extinction but is now making a comeback.

name: Ditto
description: Ditto rearranges its cell structure to transform itself into other shapes. Its transformation ability is perfect.

name: Eevee
description: Thanks to its unstable genetic makeup, this special Pokemon conceals many different possible evolutions.

name: Vaporeon
description: It lives close to water. Its long tail is ridged with a fin, which is often mistaken for a mermaid's.

name: Jolteon
description: It accumulates negative ions in the atmosphere to blast out 10,000-volt lightning bolts.

name: Flareon
description: When storing thermal energy in its body, its temperature could soar to over 1,600 degrees Fahrenheit.

name: Porygon
description: A Pokemon that consists entirely of programming code. It is capable of moving freely in cyberspace.

name: Omanyte
description: A prehistoric Pokemon that lived in the sea. It was restored from a fossil found in what was once the ocean floor.

name: Omastar
description: It is thought that this Pokemon became extinct because its shell grew too large and heavy, making its movements slow and lumbering.

name: Kabuto
description: A Pokemon that was resurrected from a fossil found in what was once the ocean floor eons ago.

name: Kabutops
description: Its sleek shape is perfect for swimming. It slashes prey with its claws and drains the body fluids.

name: Aerodactyl
description: A Rock/Flying fossil Pokemon. A ferocious ancient Pokemon that went extinct but has been revived from amber. It attacks with its serrated fangs.

name: Snorlax
description: An immense Pokemon that eats 900 pounds of food per day, then falls asleep until hungry again.

name: Dratini
description: A Dragon-type Pokemon. Long considered a myth, it was finally caught by a fisherman after 10 hours of struggle. It sheds its skin as it grows.

name: Dragonair
description: The evolved form of Dratini. Called the divine Pokemon, it can change weather conditions and has the ability to manipulate aura freely.

name: Dragonite
description: The final evolution of Dratini. It is said to make its home somewhere in the sea. It flies across the sky and circles the globe in roughly 16 hours.

name: Hoothoot
description: It always stands on one foot. It changes feet so fast, the movement can rarely be seen.

name: Noctowl
description: It unfailingly catches prey in darkness. Noctowl owe their success to superior vision that lets them see in minimal light.

name: Ledyba
description: A Bug/Flying ladybug Pokemon. It is very timid and clusters with others for warmth.

name: Ledian
description: The evolved form of Ledyba. It uses starlight to power its special punching attacks at night.

name: Spinarak
description: A Bug/Poison spider Pokemon active at night. The pattern on its back resembles a face to scare predators.

name: Ariados

locations.notes: SOS encounter from Spinarak at night

description: The evolved form of Spinarak. It spins webs from both ends of its body to trap prey.

name: Crobat
description: The final form of Zubat. Evolving through friendship, it flies silently on four wings.

name: Chinchou
description: It shoots positive and negative electricity between the tips of its two antennae and zaps its enemies.

name: Lanturn
description: The light it emits is so bright that it can illuminate the sea's surface from a depth of over three miles.

name: Pichu
description: A baby Electric-type Pokemon. It cannot yet control electricity well and may shock itself.

name: Cleffa
description: On nights with many shooting stars, Cleffa can be seen dancing in a ring. They dance through the night.

name: Igglybuff
description: Its body is very bouncy. Once it starts bouncing, it becomes impossible to stop.

name: Natu
description: Because its wings aren't fully grown, it has to hop to get around. It is always staring at something.

name: Xatu
description: This Pokemon is said to have the power to see into the future and the past. It watches the sun all day.

name: Sudowoodo
description: The evolved form of Bonsly. It disguises itself as a tree but is actually a Rock-type Pokemon.

name: Politoed
description: The curled hair on Politoed's head is proof of its status as a king. It is said the longer and curlier the hair, the more respect it earns.

name: Aipom
description: A Normal-type long tail Pokemon. It uses its powerful tail to hang from branches and steal food. Its tail is more dexterous than its real hands.

name: Espeon
description: By reading air currents, it can predict things such as weather or its foe's next move. The tip of its forked tail quivers when it does so.

name: Umbreon
description: When exposed to the moon's aura, the rings on its body glow faintly and it gains a mysterious power.

name: Murkrow
description: A Dark/Flying crow Pokemon. It leads travelers astray in the dark and is considered a bad omen.

name: Slowking
description: Alternate evolution of Slowpoke. A Shellder on its head injects toxins that give it genius-level intellect.

name: Misdreavus
description: A Ghost-type screech Pokemon. It loves to sneak up on people at night and yank their hair to make them scream, then feeds on the fear.

name: Pineco
description: It hangs from branches and waits for bug prey to come to it. If shaken while eating, it may fall and explode.

name: Forretress
description: Its entire body is shielded by a steel-hard shell. What lurks inside the shell is a total mystery.

name: Dunsparce
description: A mysterious serpent Pokemon with tiny wings. Despite its wings, it digs through the ground like a drill.

name: Snubbull
description: A Fairy-type Pokemon. Despite its intimidating face, it is actually quite timid and affectionate. Small Pokemon flee from its scary face.

name: Granbull
description: The evolved form of Snubbull. It can bite with incredible force but is actually timid and easily startled. It lashes out with its heavy fangs when surprised.

name: Scizor

locations.notes: Trade Scyther while holding Metal Coat

description: The evolved form of Scyther. It swings its eye-patterned pincers to intimidate foes and can clamp down with 20,000 pounds of crushing power.

name: Heracross
description: A Bug/Fighting single horn Pokemon. It has herculean strength and can topple a massive tree by ramming it with its horn.

name: Sneasel

evolution.condition: Level up at night holding Razor Claw

description: A Dark/Ice sharp claw Pokemon. It is extremely cunning and will work in pairs to steal eggs by having one lure the parents away while the other raids the nest.

name: Corsola
description: A Water/Rock coral Pokemon. Its branches are prized as jewelry but regrow quickly if broken.

name: Remoraid
description: A Water-type remora fish Pokemon. It spits water with pinpoint accuracy like a living water pistol.

name: Octillery
description: The evolved form of Remoraid. It traps prey with its suckers and blasts them with ink.

name: Delibird
description: An Ice/Flying Pokemon that shares food from its tail. Its Present move can heal or hurt the target.

name: Mantine

evolution.condition: Level up with Remoraid in party

description: The evolved form of Mantyke. It gracefully swims through the sea, leaping over waves like a jet.

name: Skarmory
description: Despite being clad entirely in iron-hard armor, it flies at speeds over 180 mph.

name: Houndour
description: It uses different kinds of cries for communicating with others of its kind and for pursuing prey.

name: Houndoom
description: The flames it breathes when angry contain toxins. If they cause a burn, it will hurt forever.

name: Porygon2
description: An upgraded version of Porygon designed for space exploration. It can't fly, though.

name: Smeargle
description: A painter Pokemon that uses its tail as a brush. It can permanently copy any move with Sketch.

name: Smoochum
description: A baby Ice/Psychic Pokemon. It touches everything with its lips to learn about the world around it.

name: Elekid
description: It generates electricity by spinning its arms. However, it can't store the energy it makes.

name: Magby
description: Each and every time it hiccups, a fireball flies from its mouth. Its body temperature is about 1,100 degrees Fahrenheit.

name: Miltank
description: Its milk is packed with nutrition, making it the ultimate high-energy drink. People living in the countryside drink it daily.

name: Blissey
description: The evolved form of Chansey. It senses sadness with its fluffy fur and rushes to anyone feeling down.

name: Larvitar
description: Born deep underground, it comes above ground after eating the surrounding soil. After that, it nests in the mountains.

name: Pupitar
description: It will not stay still, even while it's a pupa. It already has arms and legs under its hard shell.

name: Tyranitar
description: Its body can't be harmed by any sort of attack, so it is very eager to make challenges against enemies.

name: Wingull
description: A Water/Flying seagull Pokemon commonly found near the coast. It rides updrafts with its long wings.

name: Pelipper
description: The evolved form of Wingull. It scoops up food and water in its enormous bill to carry to its nest.

name: Surskit
description: From the tips of its feet, it secretes an oil that enables it to walk on water as if it were skating.

name: Masquerain
description: Its antennae have eye patterns on them. Its four wings allow it to hover and fly in any direction.

name: Makuhita
description: A Fighting-type Pokemon that toughens its body by slamming into trees. It never gives up training.

name: Hariyama
description: The evolved form of Makuhita. Its powerful slapping attacks can send a truck flying.

name: Nosepass

evolution.condition: Level up in magnetic field area

description: Its nose is a powerful magnet. It attracts iron objects and drags them to it.

name: Sableye
description: A Dark/Ghost Pokemon that lives deep in caves. Its eyes are made of gemstones that glitter in the dark.

name: Mawile
description: A Steel/Fairy Pokemon with huge jaws on the back of its head. It lures foes with a cute face, then strikes.

name: Electrike
description: It stores static electricity in its fur for discharging. It gives off sparks if a storm approaches.

name: Manectric
description: It stimulates its own muscles with electricity, so it can move quickly. It discharges electricity from its mane.

name: Carvanha
description: A Water/Dark savage Pokemon. It swarms any foe that invades its territory, attacking in packs until the intruder has been driven away.

name: Sharpedo
description: The evolved form of Carvanha. Known as the bully of the sea, it tears up anything in its path with its fangs. It can swim at speeds exceeding 75 mph.

name: Wailmer
description: A Water-type ball whale Pokemon. It bounces playfully like a ball. The more water it swallows, the higher it can bounce.

name: Wailord
description: The evolved form of Wailmer. The largest of all identified Pokemon. It herds prey by leaping out of the water and making a huge splash.

name: Torkoal
description: It burns coal inside its shell for energy. It blows out black soot if it is endangered.

name: Spinda
description: A Normal-type panda Pokemon. No two Spinda have the same pattern of spots, similar to fingerprints.

name: Trapinch
description: A Ground-type antlion Pokemon. It lives in arid deserts, digging cone-shaped pits in the sand to trap prey with its massive jaws.

name: Vibrava
description: The evolved form of Trapinch. It generates ultrasonic waves by vigorously making its wings vibrate, causing severe headaches in those nearby.

name: Flygon
description: The final evolution of Trapinch. Known as the Mystic Pokemon, it whips up sandstorms by flapping its wings and is called the Desert Spirit.

name: Barboach
description: A Water/Ground loach Pokemon. Its whiskers serve as a radar system to detect prey in murky water.

name: Whiscash
description: The evolved form of Barboach. It claims an entire pond as territory and causes earthquakes when enraged.

name: Corphish
description: A Water-type ruffian Pokemon. It can survive in any environment and its hardiness makes it highly invasive wherever it is released.

name: Crawdaunt
description: The evolved form of Corphish. It is extremely aggressive and will challenge anything. The star on its head marks it as the champion of its territory.

name: Baltoy
description: A Ground/Psychic clay doll Pokemon. It moves while spinning on its single foot and has been discovered in ancient ruins.

name: Claydol
description: The evolved form of Baltoy. An ancient clay figurine brought to life. It shoots beams from both hands and is said to have been made by ancient people.

name: Lileep
description: A Pokemon restored from a fossil. It lived on the seafloor 100 million years ago and sucked in nutrients with tentacle-like appendages.

name: Cradily
description: It drags its heavy body along the seafloor and catches prey in the tentacles extending from its neck.

name: Anorith
description: A Pokemon ancestor that was reanimated from a fossil. It lived in the sea and hunted with claws.

name: Armaldo
description: Protected by a hard shell, its body is very sturdy. It skewers prey with its claws to feed.

name: Feebas
description: Feebas's fins are ragged and tattered from the start of its life. Because of its shoddy appearance, this Pokemon is largely ignored.

name: Milotic
description: It is the most beautiful of all Pokemon. It has been depicted in paintings and statues since ancient times.

name: Castform
description: Its form changes depending on the weather. Changes in temperature and humidity appear to affect its cellular structure.

name: Kecleon
description: It changes its body color to blend in with its surroundings. It can become invisible by doing so.

name: Shuppet
description: A Ghost-type puppet Pokemon. It feeds on negative emotions like envy and malice, roaming towns at night searching for vengeful feelings.

name: Banette
description: The evolved form of Shuppet. A cursed doll that became a Pokemon. It seeks the child who discarded it and bears a grudge.

name: Tropius
description: A Grass/Flying fruit Pokemon. Because it continually ate only its favorite fruit, it grew fruit around its neck. It flies by flapping its leafy wings.

name: Absol
description: A Dark-type disaster Pokemon. It appears when it senses an impending natural disaster, leading people to incorrectly blame it as the cause.

name: Snorunt
description: An Ice-type snow hat Pokemon. It is said that a house visited by a Snorunt will prosper for generations to come.

name: Glalie
description: The evolved form of Snorunt. Its body is made of rock that it coats with an armor of ice. It can instantly freeze moisture in the atmosphere.

name: Clamperl
description: A Water-type clam Pokemon. It snaps its shell shut to capture prey, clamping down with immense force.

name: Huntail
description: The evolved form of Clamperl (via Deep Sea Tooth). It lures prey with its tail-light in the deep ocean.

name: Gorebyss
description: The evolved form of Clamperl (via Deep Sea Scale). It drains body fluids from prey with its thin mouth.

name: Relicanth
description: A Water/Rock ancient Pokemon that has remained unchanged for 100 million years. It was discovered during a deep-sea exploration.

name: Luvdisc
description: A heart-shaped Water-type Pokemon found in tropical seas. Couples who find one are said to be blessed with love.

name: Bagon
description: A Dragon-type Pokemon that dreams of flying. It headbutts cliffs daily, hoping to one day grow wings.

name: Shelgon
description: The evolved form of Bagon. It hides in a shell-like armor while its body prepares for its final evolution.

name: Salamence
description: The final form of Bagon. Its dream of flying finally realized, it soars through the sky with unbridled joy.

name: Beldum
description: Instead of blood, a powerful magnetic force courses throughout Beldum's body. It communicates with others by sending controlled pulses of magnetism.

name: Metang
description: When two Beldum fuse together, Metang is formed. The brains of the Beldum are joined by a magnetic nervous system.

name: Metagross
description: Metagross has four brains in total. Combined, the four brains can breeze through difficult calculations faster than a supercomputer.

name: Cranidos
description: A lifelong jungle dweller from 100 million years ago, it would snap obstructing trees with headbutts.

name: Rampardos
description: Its powerful head butt has enough power to shatter even the most durable things upon impact.

name: Shieldon
description: A Pokemon that lived in jungles around 100 million years ago. Its facial hide is extremely hard.

name: Bastiodon
description: Any frontal attack is repulsed. It is a docile Pokemon that feeds on grass and berries.

name: Shellos
description: A Water-type sea slug Pokemon. It has two forms depending on which sea it inhabits. In Alola, the pink West Sea form is found.

name: Gastrodon
description: The evolved form of Shellos. It has a pliable body without any bones. If part of it is torn off, it grows right back.

name: Ambipom

locations.notes: Level up Aipom while knowing Double Hit

description: The evolved form of Aipom. It uses its two tails to link with others of its kind. Groups live in the treetops of forests.

name: Drifloon
description: A Ghost/Flying balloon Pokemon. It tries to drag children away, but they're too heavy for it.

name: Drifblim
description: The evolved form of Drifloon. It drifts through the sky carrying people and Pokemon away.

name: Buneary
description: A Normal-type rabbit Pokemon. It curls its ears and slams them into foes with surprising force.

name: Lopunny
description: The evolved form of Buneary. An extremely cautious Pokemon that covers its body with fluffy ear fur.

name: Mismagius
description: The evolved form of Misdreavus. Its cries sound like incantations. It is said that those who hear it are afflicted with headaches and terrifying visions.

name: Honchkrow
description: The evolved form of Murkrow. It commands Murkrow flocks like a crime boss and rarely dirties its own wings.

name: Bonsly
description: A Rock-type baby Pokemon that resembles a small tree. It cries to shed moisture from its body.

name: Mime Jr.
description: A baby Psychic/Fairy mime Pokemon. It mimics the gestures of those it sees to learn new techniques.

name: Happiny
description: A baby Normal-type Pokemon that carries a round stone in its pouch, mimicking Chansey's egg.

name: Gible
description: A Dragon/Ground Pokemon that nests in small horizontal holes in cave walls. It pounces to bite anything that wanders past its hiding spot.

name: Gabite
description: The evolved form of Gible. It is known to dig up gems from the earth and hoard them in its nest, which it defends fiercely.

name: Garchomp
description: The final evolution of Gible. When it folds up its body and extends its wings, it looks like a jet plane. It flies at sonic speed.

name: Munchlax
description: A baby Snorlax. It wolfs down food without even tasting it, hiding supplies in its thick body fur.

name: Riolu
description: A Fighting-type emanation Pokemon. It has the ability to sense the auras of all things. It can tell how others are feeling from over a mile away.

name: Lucario

locations.notes: Evolve Riolu with high friendship during daytime

description: The evolved form of Riolu. By reading the auras of all things, it can sense the thoughts and movements of others. It can guide attacks to strike even evading foes.

name: Finneon
description: A Water-type fish Pokemon that glows at night. Its tail fins flutter like butterflies at dusk.

name: Lumineon
description: The evolved form of Finneon. It lures prey with the dazzling patterns on its fins in dark waters.

name: Mantyke

evolution.condition: Level up with Remoraid in party

description: A baby Water/Flying manta Pokemon. It is friendly and approaches people near the water.

name: Weavile

locations.notes: Level up Sneasel at night while holding Razor Claw

evolution.condition: Level up at night holding Razor Claw

description: The evolved form of Sneasel. It communicates by carving patterns in trees and ice with its claws. It lives in cold regions in groups of four or five.

name: Magnezone

evolution.condition: Level up at Vast Poni Canyon

description: The final form of Magnemite. It evolved due to special magnetic fields and now looks like a UFO.

name: Lickilicky

locations.notes: Level up Lickitung while knowing Rollout

description: The evolved form of Lickitung. It wraps things with its extensible tongue and its saliva contains a solvent that causes numbness on contact.

name: Electivire
description: It pushes the tips of its two tails against the foe, then lets loose with over 20,000 volts of power.

name: Magmortar
description: It blasts fireballs of over 3,600 degrees Fahrenheit out of its arms. Its breath also sears the surroundings.

name: Leafeon
description: When you see Leafeon asleep in a patch of sunshine, you'll know it is using photosynthesis to produce clean air.

name: Glaceon
description: It can control its body temperature at will. This enables it to freeze the moisture in the atmosphere, creating diamond dust.

name: Porygon-Z
description: A Pokemon created by additional programming. Due to a bug, it behaves oddly and unpredictably.

name: Probopass

evolution.condition: Level up in magnetic field area

description: It freely controls three small units called Mini-Noses using magnetic force.

name: Froslass

locations.notes: Use Dawn Stone on female Snorunt

description: An alternate evolution of Snorunt using a Dawn Stone. It freezes foes with its icy breath at nearly -60 degrees F and is said to be the spirit of a woman lost in the mountains.

name: Lillipup
description: A Normal-type puppy Pokemon. The long fur on its face acts as a radar to sense its surroundings.

name: Herdier
description: The evolved form of Lillipup. It is loyal and has been a partner to Trainers since ancient times.

name: Stoutland
description: The final form of Lillipup. Its thick fur lets it endure freezing cold, and it rescues people lost in blizzards.

name: Roggenrola
description: A Rock-type Pokemon with an ear-like core. It navigates using sound waves reflected off walls.

name: Boldore
description: The evolved form of Roggenrola. Its orange crystals are compressed energy that it fires at foes.

name: Gigalith
description: The final form of Roggenrola. It absorbs sunlight in its crystals and fires powerful energy beams.

name: Cottonee
description: A Grass/Fairy cotton puff Pokemon. When attacked, it scatters cotton to escape on the wind.

name: Whimsicott
description: The evolved form of Cottonee. It slips through gaps like the wind and leaves cotton behind wherever it goes.

name: Petilil
description: A Grass-type bulb Pokemon. The leaves on its head are very bitter but revitalize a tired body.

name: Lilligant
description: The evolved form of Petilil. A beautiful flower Pokemon that is difficult to raise but rewarding to train.

name: Basculin
description: Red- and blue-striped Basculin are very violent and always fighting. They are also remarkably tasty.

name: Sandile
description: A Ground/Dark crocodile Pokemon found in the desert. It lurks beneath the sand with only its eyes exposed, waiting for prey to pass by.

name: Krokorok
description: The evolved form of Sandile. The special membrane covering its eyes can sense the body heat of prey even in total darkness.

name: Krookodile
description: The final evolution of Sandile. It can expand the focus of its eyes, enabling it to see objects in the far distance as if through binoculars.

name: Scraggy
description: A Dark/Fighting Pokemon that pulls its rubbery skin up to its neck to reduce damage from attacks. It headbutts anyone who makes eye contact.

name: Scrafty
description: The evolved form of Scraggy. Groups of Scrafty are led by the one with the biggest crest. It protects its turf with its powerful kicks.

name: Tirtouga
description: Restored from a fossil, this Pokemon can dive to depths beyond half a mile.

name: Carracosta
description: Incredible jaw strength enables it to chew up steel beams and rocks along with the prey it catches.

name: Archen
description: Said to be an ancestor of bird Pokemon, they were unable to fly and moved about by hopping from one branch to another.

name: Archeops
description: It runs better than it flies. It catches prey by running at speeds comparable to those of an automobile.

name: Trubbish
description: Inhaling the gas they belch will cause you to sleep for a week. They prefer filthy places.

name: Garbodor
description: It clenches opponents with its left arm and finishes them off with foul-smelling poison gas belched from its mouth.

name: Zorua
description: A Dark-type illusionist fox. It disguises itself as other Pokemon to protect itself from danger.

name: Zoroark
description: The evolved form of Zorua. A master of illusions that can create elaborate phantasms to deceive groups.

name: Minccino
description: Minccino greet each other by grooming one another thoroughly with their tails.

name: Cinccino
description: Their white fur repels dust and dirt. It is coated with a special oil that makes it incredibly smooth.

name: Vanillite
description: An Ice-type fresh snow Pokemon. Born from an icicle, it uses its icy breath to chill the surrounding air and create ice crystals.

name: Vanillish
description: The evolved form of Vanillite. It freezes its opponents by blowing chilled air at them. It cools itself by bathing in frigid water.

name: Vanilluxe
description: The final evolution of Vanillite. It creates blizzards by swallowing large amounts of water and spraying it as snow clouds from its two heads.

name: Emolga
description: An Electric/Flying sky squirrel Pokemon. It glides on its membrane to discharge electricity on foes below, then flies back up on the updraft.

name: Frillish
description: A Water/Ghost jellyfish Pokemon. It envelops its prey in its veil-like arms and drags them down to depths of nearly five miles below the surface.

name: Jellicent
description: The evolved form of Frillish. The fate of ships and crews that wander into Jellicent's territory is never known. They are said to create castles from sunken ships.

name: Alomomola
description: The special membrane enveloping Alomomola has the ability to heal wounds. It drifts in the open ocean.

name: Elgyem
description: This Pokemon is shrouded in mystery. It was first discovered about 50 years ago. It controls tremendous psychic power.

name: Beheeyem
description: It can manipulate an opponent's memory. Apparently, it communicates by flashing its three differently colored fingers.

name: Mienfoo
description: A Fighting-type martial arts Pokemon. It uses flowing attack patterns and sharp claws to overwhelm its opponents in rapid combos.

name: Mienshao
description: The evolved form of Mienfoo. Using the long fur on its arms like whips, it unleashes attacks so fast they cannot be seen by the naked eye.

name: Druddigon
description: A Dragon-type cave Pokemon. It warms its body by soaking in sunlight with its wings spread. It races through narrow caves with agility.

name: Golett
description: A Ground/Ghost automaton Pokemon. Ancient science fashioned this Pokemon from clay. It runs on mysterious internal energy.

name: Golurk
description: The evolved form of Golett. It is said to have been instructed to protect people and Pokemon by the ancient civilization that created it. It can fly by retracting its legs.

name: Pawniard
description: A Dark/Steel sharp blade Pokemon. It follows Bisharp orders to corner prey. Each blade on its body leaves wounds that never heal.

name: Bisharp
description: The evolved form of Pawniard. It commands a group of Pawniard to hunt prey. The loser of a battle between two Bisharp is immediately replaced by a Pawniard.

name: Rufflet
description: A Normal/Flying eaglet Pokemon. It challenges strong opponents regardless of its own strength.

name: Braviary
description: The evolved form of Rufflet. A brave warrior eagle that fights tirelessly for its companions.

name: Vullaby
description: A Dark/Flying vulture Pokemon. It protects its rear with a bone it wears as a diaper.

name: Mandibuzz
description: The evolved form of Vullaby. It decorates itself with bones and soars on thermal currents.

name: Larvesta
description: This Pokemon was believed to have been born from the sun. When it evolves, its entire body is engulfed in flames.

name: Volcarona
description: When volcanic ash darkened the atmosphere, it is said that Volcarona's fire provided a replacement for the sun.

name: Fletchling
description: These friendly Pokemon send signals to one another with beautiful chirps and tail-feather movements.

name: Fletchinder
description: From its beak, it expels embers that set the tall grass on fire. Then it pounces on the bewildered prey.

name: Talonflame
description: In the fever of an exciting battle, it showers embers from the gaps between its feathers and takes to the air.

name: Litleo
description: A Fire/Normal lion cub Pokemon. The hotter the fire in its mane, the stronger it is. When ready to fight, its mane blazes intensely.

name: Pyroar
description: The evolved form of Litleo. The male with the largest fire mane leads the pride. It viciously threatens any challenger with a flaming mane.

name: Flabebe
description: A Fairy-type Pokemon that clings to a flower. It draws out the power of flowers to use in battle.

name: Floette
description: The evolved form of Flabebe. It tends gardens and claims a flower-covered territory as its own.

name: Florges
description: The final form of Flabebe. It creates elaborate gardens and gains power from beautiful flower beds.

name: Pancham
description: It does its best to be menacing, but it doesn't have the strength to back up its attitude. It tries to imitate Pangoro.

name: Pangoro
description: Although it possesses a violent temperament, it won't put up with bullying. It uses the leaf in its mouth to sense the movements of its enemies.

name: Furfrou
description: A fashionable poodle Pokemon. Its fur grows so quickly it can be trimmed into various stylish forms.

name: Inkay
description: A Dark/Psychic squid Pokemon that flashes hypnotic light patterns to drain the will of its opponents.

name: Malamar
description: The evolved form of Inkay. It lures prey with hypnotic body movements, then wraps them in its tentacles.

name: Skrelp
description: A Poison/Water mock kelp Pokemon. It disguises itself as rotten kelp to avoid predators and sprays a poisonous liquid on those who come near.

name: Dragalge
description: The evolved form of Skrelp. It is so toxic that it even poisons the water around it. Ships that wander into its territory are never seen again.

name: Clauncher
description: A Water-type howitzer Pokemon. It launches compressed water from its massive claw like cannonballs. Its claw is larger than its body.

name: Clawitzer
description: The evolved form of Clauncher. By compressing water in its giant claw, it can shoot cannonballs of water capable of piercing tanker hulls.

name: Tyrunt
description: Its jaws are so powerful that it can crunch up an automobile. It lived 100 million years ago.

name: Tyrantrum
description: Nothing could stop this Pokemon 100 million years ago, so it behaved like a king.

name: Amaura
description: This ancient Pokemon was restored from part of its body that had been frozen in ice for over 100 million years.

name: Aurorus
description: The diamond-shaped crystals on its body expel air as cold as -240 degrees Fahrenheit, surrounding its enemies and encasing them in ice.

name: Sylveon
description: It sends a soothing aura from its ribbon-like feelers to calm fights. It wraps them around the arm of its beloved Trainer.

name: Hawlucha
description: A Fighting/Flying luchador Pokemon. It controls its position in the air with masterful acrobatic moves.

name: Dedenne
description: Its whiskers serve as antennas. By sending and receiving electrical waves, it can communicate with others over vast distances.

name: Carbink
description: A Rock/Fairy gem Pokemon born from high temperatures and pressure underground. It sparkles beautifully.

name: Goomy
description: It's covered in a slimy membrane that makes any punches or kicks slide off it harmlessly.

name: Sliggoo
description: Its four horns are a powerful radar system. It uses them to sense sounds and smells, rather than using its underdeveloped eyes.

name: Goodra
description: This very friendly Dragon-type Pokemon will hug its beloved Trainer, leaving that Trainer covered in sticky slime.

name: Klefki
description: A Steel/Fairy key ring Pokemon. It never lets go of a key it likes, so people give it the keys to vaults and safes as a way to prevent crime.

name: Phantump
description: These Pokemon are created when spirits possess rotten tree stumps. They prefer to live in abandoned forests.

name: Trevenant
description: It can control trees at will. It will trap people who harm the forest, so they can never leave.

name: Noibat
description: A Flying/Dragon bat Pokemon that uses ultrasonic waves from its ears to navigate pitch-black caves.

name: Noivern
description: The evolved form of Noibat. Its ultrasonic blasts can shatter boulders; it rules the night sky.

name: Zygarde

locations.notes: Assemble from Zygarde Cells/Cores at Aether lab

description: It's hypothesized that it's monitoring those who destroy the ecosystem from deep in the cave where it lives.

name: Rowlet
description: A Grass/Flying starter Pokemon. This round owl can rotate its head 180 degrees and attack without making a sound.

name: Dartrix
description: The evolved form of Rowlet. This narcissistic blade quill Pokemon spends much time grooming its feathers.

name: Decidueye
description: The final evolution of Rowlet. A Grass/Ghost archer that fires arrow quills from its wings with astonishing precision.

name: Litten
description: A Fire-type starter Pokemon. It grooms itself by licking its fur, then spits the collected fur as flaming hairballs.

name: Torracat
description: The evolved form of Litten. The bell on its neck is actually a flame sac that produces flames when it battles.

name: Incineroar
description: The final evolution of Litten. A Fire/Dark wrestler Pokemon that thrives on the crowd's energy during battle.

name: Popplio
description: A Water-type starter Pokemon. This sea lion Pokemon creates water balloons from its nose to use in battle.

name: Brionne
description: The evolved form of Popplio. A dancing sea lion that creates balloon after balloon to entertain and confuse foes.

name: Primarina
description: The final evolution of Popplio. A Water/Fairy Pokemon that controls water balloons with its singing voice.

name: Pikipek
description: A Normal/Flying woodpecker Pokemon found early on Route 1. It pecks at trees 16 times per second.

name: Trumbeak
description: The evolved form of Pikipek. It stores berry seeds in its beak and fires them as projectiles in battle.

name: Toucannon
description: The final evolution of Pikipek. Its beak heats up to over 200 degrees when it battles, delivering scorching strikes.

name: Yungoos
description: A Normal-type Pokemon that patrols Route 1. It was brought to Alola to deal with the Rattata overpopulation.

name: Gumshoos
description: The evolved form of Yungoos. A patient stakeout Pokemon that waits for prey with incredible perseverance.

name: Grubbin

evolution.condition: Level up at Vast Poni Canyon

description: A Bug-type larva Pokemon. It spits sticky threads to swing from tree branches and stun predators.

name: Charjabug

evolution.condition: Level up at Vast Poni Canyon

description: The evolved form of Grubbin. A battery-like Bug/Electric Pokemon that stores electricity for its allies.

name: Vikavolt

evolution.condition: Level up at Vast Poni Canyon

description: The final form of Grubbin. A powerful Bug/Electric stag beetle that fires electric beams from its massive mandibles.

name: Crabrawler
description: A Fighting-type crab Pokemon that punches with its pincers. It is always looking for a fight.

name: Crabominable
description: The evolved form of Crabrawler. It evolved in the freezing mountains and gained the Ice type.

name: Oricorio
description: A Dancing Pokemon with four styles based on nectar: Baile (Fire), Pom-Pom (Electric), Pa'u (Psychic), Sensu (Ghost).

name: Cutiefly
description: A tiny Bug/Fairy Pokemon that can detect the auras of flowers and people to find nectar.

name: Ribombee
description: The evolved form of Cutiefly. It makes pollen puffs that serve as both weapons and nutritious snacks.

name: Rockruff
description: A Rock-type puppy Pokemon. As it nears evolution, it becomes more aggressive and independent.

name: Lycanroc
description: The evolved form of Rockruff. Midday Form is swift and loyal; Midnight Form is savage; Dusk Form is rare.

name: Wishiwashi
description: A Water-type fish that forms a massive school when threatened. Its School Form has tremendous power.

name: Mareanie
description: A Poison/Water sea star Pokemon that preys on Corsola. It attacks with its crown of poisonous tentacles.

name: Toxapex
description: The evolved form of Mareanie. Its spines deliver a toxin that persists for three days and nights.

name: Mudbray
description: It has a stubborn, individualistic disposition. Eating dirt, making mud, and playing in the mire are its favorite activities.

name: Mudsdale
description: Its heavy, mud-covered kicks are its best weapon. It can send a truck flying with a single kick.

name: Dewpider
description: It crawls onto the land in search of food. Its water bubble allows it to breathe and protects its soft head.

name: Araquanid
description: It delivers headbutts with the water bubble on its head. Small Pokemon get sucked into the bubble, where they drown.

name: Fomantis
description: During the day, it spreads its leaves to absorb sunlight. It is quite the nocturnal Pokemon and is active at night.

name: Lurantis
description: It requires a lot of effort to maintain its vivid coloring, which dulls if it is not well cared for. It's the Totem Pokemon of Lush Jungle.

name: Morelull
description: It scatters spores that flicker and glow. Anyone who sees the light falls into a deep sleep.

name: Shiinotic
description: Forests where Shiinotic live are treacherous to enter at night. People confused by its strange lights can never find their way home.

name: Salandit
description: It burns its bodily fluids to create a poisonous gas. When its firing, the yellow markings on its body flicker.

name: Salazzle
description: For some reason, only females have been found. It creates a reverse harem of male Salandit that it lives with.

name: Stufful
description: Despite its cute appearance, when it gets angry and thrashes about, its arms can snap thick tree trunks like twigs.

name: Bewear
description: This immensely dangerous Pokemon possesses overwhelming physical strength. Its habitat is generally off-limits.

name: Bounsweet
description: A delicious-smelling Pokemon that is often swallowed whole by Toucannon attracted by its scent.

name: Steenee
description: The sepals on its head developed to protect its body. These are quite hard, so even if a bird Pokemon pecks at it, it's totally fine.

name: Tsareena
description: Its legs are as strong as its pride. It mercilessly stomps anyone who underestimates or disrespects it.

name: Comfey
description: It attaches flowers to its vine and dances when in a good mood. It spreads its healing fragrance to the surrounding area.

name: Oranguru
description: Known for its extreme intelligence, it will look down on inexperienced Trainers, so it's best suited to experienced Trainers.

name: Passimian
description: They form groups of about 20 and live together. Thanks to their teamwork, they can drive away opponents much larger than themselves.

name: Wimpod
description: It's nature's custodian, cleaning up the remains of other Pokemon's meals. It scurries away if anything gets too close.

name: Golisopod
description: With a flashing slash of its giant sharp claws, it cleaves seawater, or even air, right in two.

name: Sandygast
description: Born from a sand mound playfully built by a child, this Pokemon embodies the grudges of the departed.

name: Palossand
description: Buried beneath the castle are masses of dried-up bones from those whose vitality it has drained.

name: Pyukumuku
description: It lives in shallow seas, such as those around Alola. If it gets too much sun, its body dries out, so it stays put on the seafloor.

name: Type: Null
description: The heavy mask fitted on it controls its power. It was created to defeat a certain Pokemon.

name: Silvally
description: Its trust in its partner awakened its latent abilities. The helmet that suppressed its power was destroyed, and it gained a new type-changing ability.

name: Minior
description: Originally making its home in the ozone layer, it hurtles to the ground when the shell enclosing its body grows too heavy.

name: Komala
description: It is born asleep, and it dies asleep. All its movements are just the result of it tossing and turning in its dreams.

name: Turtonator
description: The shell on its back is chemically unstable and explodes violently if struck. Its breath attack is also explosive.

name: Togedemaru
description: The spiny fur on its back is normally at rest. When it becomes charged with electricity, the spiny fur bristles, becoming sharp enough to pierce foes.

name: Mimikyu
description: A Ghost/Fairy Pokemon disguised as Pikachu. Its actual appearance is unknown. A scholar who saw what was under its rag was overwhelmed by terror and died from the shock.

name: Bruxish
description: A Water/Psychic gnash teeth Pokemon. It grinds its teeth with enough force to shatter coral and produces a powerful psychic energy from the protuberance on its head.

name: Drampa
description: A Normal/Dragon Pokemon that lives alone in the mountains. It is friendly to people and Pokemon and is popular with the elderly and children.

name: Dhelmise
description: A Ghost/Grass sea creeper Pokemon. Swinging its massive anchor, it can KO a Wailord in a single blow. It drags sunken ships from the ocean floor.

name: Jangmo-o
description: A Dragon-type scaly Pokemon. It expresses itself by clanging its scales together. It lives and trains with others in harsh mountains.

name: Hakamo-o
description: The evolved form of Jangmo-o. It dances before battle to show its power. The scales it sheds during the dance are used as traditional decorations.

name: Kommo-o
description: The final evolution of Jangmo-o. The Totem of Vast Poni Canyon. Its scales create a mighty war cry that dispels dark forces and weak enemies alike.

name: Tapu Koko
description: The guardian deity of Melemele Island. Although called a guardian deity, it is fickle and does not always respond to people's requests for help.

name: Tapu Lele
description: The guardian deity of Akala Island. Although appearing cute, it scatters glowing scales that stimulate the body, causing both healing and harm.

name: Tapu Bulu
description: The guardian deity of Ula'ula Island. Despite its fearsome appearance, it is actually quite lazy and prefers to avoid unnecessary conflict.

name: Tapu Fini
description: The guardian deity of Poni Island. It creates a thick fog to repel those who approach with ill intent and purifies the water to heal the sick.

name: Cosmog
description: A Psychic-type nebula Pokemon. Even though its body is small, it stores a vast amount of energy. It was born from a cloud of dust and gas.

name: Cosmoem
description: A Psychic-type protostar Pokemon. The cocoon form of Cosmog. Motionless as if dead, it can be found with faint light emanating from within.

name: Solgaleo
description: The emissary of the sun. Since ancient times, it has been honored as the beast that devours the sun. It radiates blinding light from its entire body.

name: Lunala
description: The emissary of the moon. Since ancient times, it has been honored as the beast that calls the moon. It sometimes devours light and plunges the area into darkness.

name: Nihilego

locations.notes: Ultra Beast encountered through Ultra Wormhole

description: An Ultra Beast known as UB-01 Symbiont. A parasitic creature from another dimension that looks like a glass jellyfish and fuses with other life forms.

name: Buzzwole

locations.notes: Ultra Beast encountered through Ultra Wormhole (Ultra Sun)

description: An Ultra Beast known as UB-02 Absorption. This muscular creature from another dimension absorbs the energy of its opponents by draining their fluids.

name: Pheromosa

locations.notes: Ultra Beast encountered through Ultra Wormhole (Ultra Moon)

description: An Ultra Beast known as UB-02 Beauty. This elegant creature from another dimension moves so fast it is nearly impossible to track.

name: Xurkitree

locations.notes: Ultra Beast encountered through Ultra Wormhole

description: An Ultra Beast known as UB-03 Lighting. This alien entity resembles a bundle of electrical wires and can discharge enormous amounts of electricity.

name: Celesteela

locations.notes: Ultra Beast encountered through Ultra Wormhole (Ultra Moon)

description: An Ultra Beast known as UB-04 Blaster. This rocket-like entity launches itself into the sky using combustible gas and can level forests as it takes off.

name: Kartana

locations.notes: Ultra Beast encountered through Ultra Wormhole (Ultra Sun)

description: An Ultra Beast known as UB-04 Blade. This paper-thin entity from another dimension can cut through a steel tower with a single stroke.

name: Guzzlord

locations.notes: Ultra Beast encountered through Ultra Wormhole

description: An Ultra Beast known as UB-05 Glutton. It devours anything and everything without leaving any trace, including mountains, buildings, and oceans.

name: Necrozma
description: A Psychic-type prism Pokemon. It was once known as the Blinding One that shared its light. It fused with Solgaleo/Lunala to regain its true form.

name: Magearna

locations.notes: QR Code event at Antiquities of the Ages in Hau'oli City Mall

description: A Steel/Fairy mythical Pokemon. It was created by a genius scientist 500 years ago. It has the ability to perceive the emotions and thoughts of other Pokemon.

name: Marshadow
description: A Fighting/Ghost mythical Pokemon. It lurks in the shadows of others and copies their movements. When it emerges, its fighting spirit ignites in green flame.

name: Poipole
description: This Ultra Beast is well enough behaved to be given as a starter Pokemon in its own world. It is quite sociable.

name: Naganadel
description: It stores hundreds of liters of poisonous liquid inside its body. It is one of the organisms known as Ultra Beasts.

name: Stakataka

locations.notes: Ultra Beast encountered in Ultra Moon post-game

description: An Ultra Beast known as UB Assembly. It is made up of many individual life forms stacked together. Each one has an eye-like marking on it.

name: Blacephalon

locations.notes: Ultra Beast encountered in Ultra Sun post-game

description: An Ultra Beast known as UB Burst. It tricks targets by blowing its own head up. The explosion scatters its body, which then reconvenes and reforms.

name: Zeraora
description: A mythical Electric-type thunderclap Pokemon. It generates a powerful magnetic field by running an electric current through its paw pads. It can move at lightning speed.
